About Us
FAVORITE
Donkatsu
Fried pork cutlet with tomato base sauce, rice, salad, potato salad
​
Bulgogi Kimbob
Pickle radish, fishcake, egg, cucumber, carrot
with sesame leaf, bulgogi
​
Jjahm Pong (Ramyun/Udon)
Korean instant noodle soup with chili oil, egg
and squid, mussels, shrimp
​
Jjolmyun
Cold chewy noodle with vegetable, sweet spicy sauce
Spicy Pork Cup Bob
Fried rice, salad, potato salad, spicy pork
with fried egg, spicy mayo sauce
​
Kimchi Cheese Omelette Rice
Kimchi fried rice covered with egg,cheese and ketchup, spicy mayoKimchi

meta.meta_description: Dan Moo Ji is a fun take on your traditional Korean food. From sushi and kimbobs to ramyun, you will surely find something that your taste buds will love. We will quickly become your favorite K-Food place.
